mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, description, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0
AND (role_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (role_code, role_name, description, status, sort) VALUES (#{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_role
role_code = #{roleCode}, role_name = #{roleName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
